description:
BinOp::Pipe in src/typer.rs::infer dispatches via apply_arrow directly, bypassing the Expr::Call arm where fz-ul4.4.1 records call_obs_curr. So a |> f(b, c) does not accumulate observations for f, and any pipe-only call site of a user fn fails to drive monomorphization.

Fix: factor the obs-recording out of the Call arm into a helper, call it from the Pipe arm too. Two-line change once factored.

Acceptance: a synthetic test where main only ever invokes f via pipe: f types as if it had been called directly.

Low priority — the codebase rarely uses pipe with user fns at top level; mostly pipes into vec_map / list builtins.
title: Typer: pipe-operator call-site observation
